Withdrawal Settings: Enable or disable the withdrawal button functionality.
Email address to receive withdrawal notifications. If empty, the general store email will be used.

Withdrawal Settings: Number of days after order placement during which withdrawal is allowed. Default: 14 days.
Fortrydelsesindstillinger: Antal dage efter afsendelse af den sidste delleverance, i hvilke fortrydelse er tilladt. Standard: 14 dage.

Withdrawal Settings: Email template sent to the customer after withdrawal request.

Fortrydelsesindstillinger: E-mailskabelon sendt til butiksejeren efter fortrydelsesanmodning.

Fortrydelsesindstillinger: Vi har modtaget din fortrydelsesanmodning for ordre #%order_increment_id.

Withdrawal Settings: Your withdrawal request has been registered successfully.
The shop will process your withdrawal request and contact you regarding the next steps (e.g. return of goods, refund).
Fortrydelsesindstillinger: Butikken vil behandle din fortrydelsesanmodning og kontakte dig vedrørende de næste trin (f.eks. retur, refusion).

Withdrawal Settings: If you have any questions, please contact us.
Fortrydelsesindstillinger: Hvis du har spørgsmål, er du velkommen til at kontakte os.

Fortrydelsesindstillinger: Delvis tilbagetrækning anmodet af kunde den %1. Varer: %2

Fortrydelsesindstillinger: Giver kunder mulighed for at trække individuelle varer tilbage i stedet for hele ordren.

Withdrawal Settings: We have received your %withdrawal_type_label for Order #%order_increment_id.
Fortrydelsesindstillinger: Vi har modtaget din %withdrawal_type_label for ordre #%order_increment_id.
